request.sql: SELECT id, user_id, order_no, amount, status, created_at FROM orders WHERE #{orderNo}

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_orders_status ON public.orders USING btree (status)
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_user_created ON public.orders USING btree (user_id, created_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX orders_order_no_key ON public.orders USING btree (order_no)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX orders_pkey ON public.orders USING btree (id)

request.templateSql:
SELECT <include refid="OrderHarnessColumns" />
        FROM orders
        <where>
            <foreach collection="orderNos" item="orderNo" open="order_no IN (" separator="," close=")">
                #{orderNo}
            </foreach>
        </where>
